title: Add Terminal Recovery After maxConsecutiveFailures — Don't Idle Forever
description:
CRITICAL finding from Plan Recovery Specialist. When maxConsecutiveFailures=3 is reached, the agent sets _currentGoal=null and idles forever. There is NO automatic fallback goal (wander, explore, return-to-spawn, self-diagnose). The agent just sits still until a user sends a chat message.

Fix: After goal abandonment, enqueue a fallback behavior: either "Wander" or "Explore" or "ReturnToSpawn" or "SelfDiagnose". At minimum, log at Warning that agent has no goal and is idling.

Source: Sprint 51 Council, Plan Recovery Specialist, Finding F-TERMINAL
